en: Chris Gardner. How are you? Good morning.
Chris Gardner. Chris Gardner. Good to see you again.
Chris Gardner. Pleasure. I've been sitting out there for the last half hour
trying to come up with a story that would explain my being here
dressed like this. And I wanted to come up with a story
that would demonstrate qualities that I'm sure you all admire here, like earnestness or diligence
And I couldn't think of anything.
So the truth is, I was arrested for failure to pay parking tickets.
